name: My boss says my neck pain from work isn't covered because I have arthritis already, is that true?
description: Covered if work aggravated it; get doctor opinion.

mainEntity.name: My boss says my neck pain from work isn't covered because I have arthritis already, is that true?

acceptedAnswer.text: Covered if work aggravated it; get doctor opinion.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, Utah workers' comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions if work caused the worsening.** Courts allow benefits if the job injury didn't heal properly.[1] Key factors: Doctor opinion on aggravation vs. degeneration; no need to prove solely work caused it. Get independent medical exam if disputed. Push back with evidence; denials can be appealed. Legal help navigates this common issue.
